text.title: AWS Serverless API (Lambda + API Gateway + DynamoDB + EventBridge) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: ddb-single-table-design
step.action: Design PK + SK + GSI for every access pattern.

step.name: lambda
step.action: Author Lambda with arm64 + Active X-Ray + ≥python3.12.

step.name: api-gw
step.action: Provision HTTP API with custom_domain + explicit CORS + throttling.
step.decision-gate: Apply rules http-api-not-rest + cors-explicit + throttling-set + custom-domain.

step.name: eventbridge-sqs
step.action: Route async events via EventBridge; consumers behind SQS with DLQ.

step.name: step-functions
step.action: If multi-step orchestration needed, provision Step Functions; otherwise skip.
